name: Create Historical Newspaper Front Page
description:
A history teacher needs a model 'front page' for a student project about the American Revolution. Create a 2-page flipchart saved as /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/independence_gazette.flipchart with the following requirements:

Page 1 — The Front Page:
- Masthead: 'The Independence Gazette'
- Dateline: 'Philadelphia, July 5, 1776'
- Main Headline: 'Independence Declared!'
- Byline: 'By Benjamin Harris'
- Layout: Include at least two vertical column dividers.
- Article Body: Write at least two sentences mentioning the 'Continental Congress' and the 'Declaration of Independence'.
- Sidebar Headline: 'King George Responds'

Page 2 — Student Instructions:
- Title: 'Your Assignment'
- Instructions: List requirements for the students.
- Visual: Include a rectangular border or highlight box for the instructions.
